blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,215 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
